mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, email, education_level, school_name, major, gpa_value, gpa_scale, rank_value, target_major_text, intake_term, budget_currency, budget_min, budget_max, budget_note FROM student_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, name, email, education_level, school_name, major, gpa_value, gpa_scale, rank_value, target_major_text, intake_term, budget_currency, budget_min, budget_max, budget_note FROM student_profile WHERE user_id IN
#{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE student_profile SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, education_level = #{educationLevel}, school_name = #{schoolName}, major = #{major}, gpa_value = #{gpaValue}, gpa_scale = #{gpaScale}, rank_value = #{rankValue}, target_major_text = #{targetMajorText}, intake_term = #{intakeTerm}, budget_currency = #{budgetCurrency}, budget_min = #{budgetMin}, budget_max = #{budgetMax}, budget_note = #{budgetNote} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
